copy-webrium-bin: php -r "\$src = 'vendor/webrium/console/webrium'; \$dest = 'webrium'; if (file_exists(\$src)) { copy(\$src, \$dest); chmod(\$dest, 0755); echo 'webrium binary updated.' . PHP_EOL; } else { echo 'webrium binary not found in vendor.' . PHP_EOL; }"
post-create-project-cmd: php -r "echo PHP_EOL . '✅ Webrium installed successfully!' . PHP_EOL . '👉 Run: npm install && npm run dev' . PHP_EOL . PHP_EOL;"
